mapper.select: SELECT usvc_outb_id, outb_posx, outb_posy FROM ( SELECT usvc_outb_id, outb_posx, outb_posy, ST_Distance( ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{lon}::numeric, #{lat}::numeric), 4326)::geography, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(outb_posx, outb_posy), 4326)::geography ) AS calc_distance_m, evt_json FROM xeus.mon_evet_list WHERE (evt_json::jsonb ->> 'dist') IS NOT NULL AND usvc_outb_id <> #{usvcOutbId} AND evt_typ_cd = #{evtTypCd} ) AS t WHERE calc_distance_m <= (evt_json::jsonb ->> 'dist')::numeric
